activity.description: There is people playing footaball. One in red and attacking and the rest in white clothes. We can also see the goal keeper.
activity.open_question: Look at the image. Describe what you see in your own words. What is happening? Who is in the picture? What are they doing?

questions.sentence: There __________ people playing football in the image.
One player is wearing a __________ shirt and is attacking.
We can also see the __________ in front of the goal.
The other players are wearing __________ clothes.
